mnemonics: SMART Goals: Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, Time-bound
keyPoints: Objectives should be clear and unambiguous (Specific).
Progress towards the objective must be trackable (Measurable).
Objectives must be realistic and attainable given available resources (Achievable).
The goal should align with broader business values and objectives (Relevant).
Every objective needs a clearly defined timeline or deadline (Time-bound).
commonMistakes: Setting vague objectives that are open to interpretation.
Focusing on activities instead of measurable outcomes.
Not aligning project objectives with overall organizational strategy.
